prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Lambda II RS 3.8L (G6DA) with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm, 11.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Brian Crower (272° intake/280° exhaust, 0.450" lift) and upgraded valve springs/retainers from Supertech.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate and a PTP 4" V-band downpipe. Use a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (4.5" core) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines to manage boost levels at 18-20 psi.

Drivetrain: Swap the stock 6-speed manual (M6VR2) for a Liberty Gears 5-speed dogbox with a 2.95 final drive ratio. Upgrade to a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel and pair with a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD. Reinforce the rear subframe with a Cusco subframe brace and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension.
estetica: Aero: Install a Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders (3.5" wider front, 4.5" wider rear) and a custom carbon fiber front splitter from Seibon. Add a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height) with aluminum supports and a custom gurney flap.

Suspension: Replace the OEM setup with a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV kit (coilovers with 8-way damping adjustment) and spherical bearing upper control arms from Megan Racing. Add Cusco front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane subframe bushings from Whiteline.

Exterior: Apply a full 3M Matte Military Green (M227) wrap with a gloss black roof and mirror caps. Replace the headlights with custom Morimoto XB LED projectors (3,000K amber fogs) and add a custom carbon fiber hood from VIS Racing with a 3" cowl induction scoop. Finish with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +15 front, 19x11 +20 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear).
